# Briefly
// Brief description of the bug

# Reproducibility 
// Ideally some numeric estimate like 50%, or 9 times out of 10

# Setup
// app version, details about the app like which timeline calendar to use, should there be a campaign, specific settings that need specific values

# Reproduction Steps
// Steps that lead to the bug
1. step
2. step

# Current Behaviour
// the bug that occurs after following the above steps

# Desired Behaviour
// the correct behaviour after following the steps
